claim: Poetry is the recommended package dependency manager for Python package development and distribution to PyPI
actionable: Use Poetry with 'poetry new' to initialize projects, 'poetry build' to create distributions, and 'poetry publish' to deploy to PyPI or TestPyPI
source_title: pip install YOUR-PACKAGE: Building your first python with Poetry, AIDER, and ChatGPT

claim: Aider is an effective AI pair programming assistant for converting natural language instructions from ChatGPT into code changes
actionable: Export OPENAI_API_KEY, run 'aider' in terminal, add context files with 'add', then paste ChatGPT instructions to have Aider implement them across all project files
source_title: pip install YOUR-PACKAGE: Building your first python with Poetry, AIDER, and ChatGPT

claim: ChatGPT with GPT-4 can provide step-by-step instructions for Python packaging and deployment that are accurate enough to be directly implemented by AI coding assistants
actionable: Ask ChatGPT specific questions about packaging steps (e.g., 'how can I use poetry to deploy my package'), then feed the detailed response directly to Aider as implementation instructions
source_title: pip install YOUR-PACKAGE: Building your first python with Poetry, AIDER, and ChatGPT

claim: Poetry's pyproject.toml file can be configured to create CLI entry points using [tool.poetry.scripts] section for command-line applications
actionable: Add [tool.poetry.scripts] header to pyproject.toml and specify entry point (e.g., 'package-name = "package_name.module:main"') to make Python package callable as global CLI command
source_title: pip install YOUR-PACKAGE: Building your first python with Poetry, AIDER, and ChatGPT

claim: Combining AI-generated instructions from ChatGPT with AI code implementation from Aider creates an efficient learning and prototyping workflow
actionable: Create a feedback loop where ChatGPT generates instructions, Aider implements them, and you test results to accelerate learning of new technologies
source_title: pip install YOUR-PACKAGE: Building your first python with Poetry, AIDER, and ChatGPT
